name: schovi
description: Personal software engineering workflows for structured commits, PR publishing, review, debugging, and Jira context detection.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering workflows for Git, GitHub, Jira, and debugging
interface.longDescription: Personal workflow automation for software engineering tasks. Includes structured commits, pull request publishing, code review, debugging workflows, and Jira issue context detection.
defaultPrompt: Use $commit to create a structured commit.
Use $review to review this branch or PR.
Use $publish to create or update a draft PR.
